description: Letter from Salama b. Nissim b. Ishaq al-Barqi of Busir to Abu Ishaq (Barhun) b. Ismail al-Tāhartī, dealing with the production of flax and linen. The writer complains about the difficulties he has obtaining flax and gives details about the processing of flax. (Information from Mediterranean Society, I, pp. 105 and 418, and Gil)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מ-Būṣīr. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
